projects.name: Dual-Clock
projects.description: Dual-Clock is a lightweight, Java-based desktop application that displays time in two distinct formats simultaneously. Built using Java Swing , it features a modern Dark Mode interface with a precise Digital display and a smoothly animated Analog face.

projects.name: Qoute-Studio-AI
projects.description: The Immersive Quote Studio is a full-stack web application developed using Python Flask and Vanilla JavaScript to provide users with a premium content creation experience. It transforms a simple API data retrieval process into an interactive digital studio.

projects.name: Quize-Game
projects.description: An educational C++ project demonstrating Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) principles, file handling (fstream), and modular development using separate header and source files.

projects.name: Scientific-Calculator
projects.description: A high-end, modular Scientific Calculator built in Java. This suite integrates mathematical, physical, and financial tools with a professional "Casio-style" interface.

projects.name: Simple-Calculator
projects.description: This project is a command-line utility implemented in C that functions as a fully interactive scientific calculator. It is designed to demonstrate proficiency in modular C programming, multi-file compilation management (using Makefile), basic data structures, and the utilization of the standard C math library (<math.h>).

projects.name: Snake-Game
projects.description: A classic Snake Game implemented in C++ using the CMake build system. This project is optimized for console execution on Windows using the MinGW (GCC/G++) toolchain.

projects.name: Student-Grading--System
projects.description: This project is a console-based utility implemented in C designed for managing and tracking student academic records, grades, and overall performance. It serves as an excellent demonstration of intermediate C programming concepts, specifically focusing on data organization and persistent storage.

projects.name: Table-Tennis
projects.description: A lightweight, pseudo-3D Table Tennis game built with Java Swing. No external engines or libraries required.

projects.name: Type-Master
projects.description: Type-Master is a high-performance, minimalist typing master built with Django and powered by Groq Cloud AI. It features a "Perspective" layout inspired by modern editorial design, providing philosophical tech quotes for a focused typing experience.

projects.name: Weather-APP
projects.description: A high-performance, single-screen weather station designed for efficiency and aesthetics. Unlike standard weather widgets, Weather Pro aggregates critical environmental data—including Air Quality (AQI), humidity, and wind speed—into a unified "Glassmorphism" interface that fits perfectly on standard screens without scrolling.
